ddls:
CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "meeting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of committee meetings (e.g., weekly, biweekly, monthly) */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chairperson responsible for the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's responsibilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the committee was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the committee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_types" (
  "committee_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee type */,
  "committee_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_meeting_types" (
  "committee_meeting_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee meeting type */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "committee_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee type */,
  "meeting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the meeting type (e.g., weekly, biweekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_meeting_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_meeting_types_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_meeting_types_committee_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_type_id") REFERENCES committee_types ("committee_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member (e.g., Chairperson, Deputy Chairperson, Member) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee the member belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the member (e.g., Mr., Ms., Dr.) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_responsibilities" (
  "responsibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each responsibility */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "responsibility" TEXT /* Description of the responsibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("responsibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_responsibilities_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_responsibilities_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_items" (
  "action_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action item */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "action_item" TEXT /* Description of the action item */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the action item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_items_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_items_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee holding the meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date the meeting was held */,
  "total_meetings" INTEGER /* Total number of meetings */,
  "max_attendance" INTEGER /* Maximum number of meetings that could be attended */,
  "actual_attendance" INTEGER /* Actual number of meetings attended */,
  "meeting_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Whether the member attended the meeting (True or False) */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time the member arrived at the meeting */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time the member departed from the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Attendance rate of the committee */,
  "meeting_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, member, staff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
